arts.ttl: Barca rule out Camp Nou return this season and may have to wait until 2026
arts.sum: The latest update on the situation claims that the earliest Barca will be able to play at their famous old ground once again is in October 2025. Barcelona are also said to be some way off being able to secure the requisite permits needed by the fire service to host football matches at the ground.

arts.ttl: PSG vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot sent "favourites" warning before Champions League clash as Barcelona comparison made
arts.sum: Ex-Liverpool striker John Aldridge warns the Reds that they are no longer the favourites to win the Champions League following their nightmare draw.

arts.ttl: Lage expecting ‘great game’ against Barca as Benfica boss talks strategy
arts.sum: “I can’t predict how many goals will be scored in the match, but I can predict a great game of football because there are two teams that have their sights set on attacking,” he told reporters. “We will face a great team, with a lot of goals scored, but we also look at the positive things we did against this opponent, like the number of chances we had, the number of times we were in front of the goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Liverpool rival Barcelona for Leao - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are considering a move for AC Milan forward Rafael Leao, Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez was blocked from leaving in January and Manchester City are targeting Leicester's teenage sensation Jeremy Monga.
